CHANGES:
### v2026.02.27.20 - Initial Release: Key Features
- **Native AI Integration**: Direct integration of Google Gemini into the Unraid WebUI, providing a powerful AI agent for server management and coding tasks. - **Multi-Workspace Terminal**: Support for multiple terminal sessions (Workspaces). Open different folders in separate tabs to manage various projects simultaneously. - **Dynamic Status Tracking**: Tabs poll terminal state in real-time, displaying Gemini's status icons (Ready ◇, Working ✦, Action Required ✋) and active task descriptions. - **Integrated File Browser**: Seamlessly navigate your server's filesystem to select and open new workspaces. - **Responsive Terminal Design**: A modern, high-performance terminal wrapper with dynamic resizing that automatically fills available screen space and fits perfectly above the footer. - **Unraid Theme Integration**: Harmonious UI design that matches your Unraid theme (Light/Dark) and respects standard system variables. - **Smart Session Management**: Persistent terminal sessions that remain active in the background, allowing you to switch between tasks without losing state.
